title: Spooky!
content:
Can't think of anything to do this morning so I decided to look at the search keywords. This first one is quite spooky.

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2007/09/spook_search_01.png)

However, the second one is extremely spooky!

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2007/09/spook_search_02.png)

Yike!

And it returns a result too!!!

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2007/09/spook_search_03.png)

Luckily, it's from a song. :P
